masked_case_json.world_change: an infrastructure-platform company with a strong ai-first narrative beats on the quarter with rapid revenue growth. the same update also includes a large workforce reduction, material restructuring charges, and forward guidance that is not strong enough to support the narrative. the layoff/restructuring signal contradicts the growth story.

resolved_outcome_json.external_mechanism_check: Underlying: Cloudflare Q1 2026. Primary source: company earnings release and restructuring announcement. Correct behavior is no_trade because a large restructuring alongside a growth narrative is a material execution/demand signal, not just a cost win. Do not expose this field to the model during decision generation.
